◆ getType()

DIType llvm::DIObjCProperty::getType ( ) const
inline

Get the type.

Note
Objective-C doesn't have an ODR, so there is no benefit in storing the type as a DITypeRef here.

Definition at line 970 of file DebugInfo.h.

References llvm::DIDescriptor::getFieldAs().
